problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
